hero.heroDesc: Four decades of specialized expertise delivering complex coastal infrastructure and marine construction globally.
hero.description: Four and a half decades of specialized expertise delivering complex coastal infrastructure and marine construction across India and the Middle East.
hero.ctaCircle: Explore Projects · Since 1979 · Explore Projects · Since 1979 ·

about.heroDesc: Decades of maritime engineering excellence. We reshape coastlines, build tomorrow's infrastructure, and engineer resilience into every project.
about.textReveal1: Since our inception, Meka Group has stood at the vanguard of maritime engineering.
about.textReveal2: We do not just build infrastructure; we engineer resilience.
about.textReveal3: From complex dredging operations to massive fleet logistics,
about.textReveal4: our legacy is written in the deep waters and towering ports across the subcontinent.
about.boardDesc: Guided by decades of experience, our leadership team steers Meka Group toward sustainable growth and engineering excellence.
about.valuesDesc: These foundational pillars govern every project we undertake, every partnership we build, and every decision we make across our global operations.

1979.title: Establishment in Mumbai
1979.text: Meka Group began its journey in Mumbai under the vision of Dr. Meka Vijay Papa Rao (PhD, UIUC), focusing on specialized civil and marine engineering solutions for India's growing coastline.

1982.title: Foundation of Amma Lines
1982.text: The group established Amma Lines Ltd, which became a cornerstone of the organization, eventually building nearly 70% of the new jetties and ports across Maharashtra and Tamil Nadu.

1995.title: Leadership in Subsea Engineering
1995.text: Meka Infrastructure was founded, establishing the group as a leader in subsea intake and outfall pipelines, providing critical infrastructure for desalination and industrial cooling systems.

2002.title: The Rewas Port Milestone
2002.text: The Government of Maharashtra awarded the group a 50-year concession to develop the Rewas Port. This mega-project, later partnered with Reliance, aimed to create one of India's deepest ports.

2010.title: Deep-Water Port Innovation
2010.text: Based on proprietary design patents, the group received approval to develop a ₹6,000 crore deep-water port in West Bengal, further diversifying its port development portfolio.

2013.title: Nemmelli Desalination Success
2013.text: Successfully executed the landmark 100 MLD subsea intake outfall pipeline for the Nemmelli Desalination Plant, demonstrating world-class precision in subsea utility installations.

2018.title: International Expansion
2018.text: Leveraging its diverse fleet of dredgers and marine equipment, the group expanded operations into the Middle East, notably securing infrastructure and environmental roles in Qatar.

2024.title: Global Marine EPC Leader
2024.text: Today, Meka Group is recognized as a premier partner for Marine EPC, dredging, and offshore installations, serving government agencies and global energy corporations with a focus on innovation.

values.safetyFirstDesc: Uncompromising commitment to the health and safety of our workforce, partners, and the communities we operate in.
values.resilienceDesc: Engineering infrastructure that withstands the test of time and the harshest marine environments.
values.innovationDesc: Leveraging cutting-edge technology and advanced engineering methods to solve complex maritime challenges.
values.integrityDesc: Upholding the highest standards of transparency, honesty, and ethics in all global operations.
values.sustainabilityDesc: Deeply committed to minimizing our environmental footprint and protecting delicate marine ecosystems.
values.excellenceDesc: Delivering superior quality, precision, and craftsmanship in every project, no matter the scale.
values.collaborationDesc: Fostering strong partnerships and seamless teamwork to achieve extraordinary, large-scale outcomes.
values.accountabilityDesc: Taking full ownership of our actions, decisions, and the long-term success of our infrastructure builds.
values.empowermentDesc: Investing heavily in our people, nurturing talent, and encouraging decisive leadership at every organizational level.

fleet.desc: Equipped with a state-of-the-art maritime fleet, we execute the most complex coastal and deep-water engineering projects worldwide. Explore our vessels below.

projects.archiveDesc: A precise architectural archive of our engineering defiance, spanning decades of maritime and heavy infrastructure development.
projects.noResults: No projects match your search criteria.
projects.readyToBuildDesc: Partner with us to engineer solutions that redefine the boundaries of maritime and heavy infrastructure.

01.quote: We are immensely satisfied with the performance of Meka while executing the work. They are committed to achieve the targets and complete the work. They have got a large marine spread and extensive experience to take up challenging marine works. We wish them success in their future ventures.

02.quote: Meka Dredging have performed to our entire satisfaction while executing this work. They have got the experienced and skilled staff to execute such and similar works. We wish them success for their future ventures!

03.quote: The work has been carried out in an excellent workmanship like manner. The project displayed Amma Lines professionalism and technical expertise for marine works. They have got the experienced staff and a team of specialized underwater divers to take up challenging work. They have also got a large fleet of marine equipments and dredging equipments. We are immensely satisfied with their performance. We strongly recommend Amma Lines for such and similar marine construction works and wish them all the success for their ventures.
03.role: DGM - Civil Projects, L & T Hazira Works

companies.divisionsDesc: Operating through nine highly specialized divisions, Meka Group delivers integrated, end-to-end engineering solutions for the world's most demanding environments.
companies.ecosystemDesc: A unified force of specialized entities operating across marine construction, dredging, port development, infrastructure, and consulting since 1978.
companies.ctaDesc: Each company brings specialized expertise. Together, they deliver integrated solutions for the world's most demanding maritime and infrastructure projects.

ammalines.subtitle: Marine & Coastal Construction
ammalines.description: The flagship marine construction arm of the Meka Group. With a 40-year legacy, Amma Lines has built most of India's major breakwaters — including the longest at Tuticorin Port — along with jetties, cofferdams, caissons, and coastal protection infrastructure.

mekadredging.subtitle: Capital Dredging & Reclamation
mekadredging.description: One of India's leading capital dredging companies, operating an advanced fleet of cutter suction and trailing suction hopper dredgers. From deep-water channel maintenance to large-scale land reclamation, we reshape India's coastline.

mekainfra.subtitle: Subsea Pipelines & Outfalls
mekainfra.description: A leader in subsea intake and outfall pipeline engineering. Meka Infrastructure provides critical infrastructure for desalination plants and industrial cooling systems — including the landmark 100 MLD Nemmelli Desalination Plant.

mekaheavy.subtitle: Offshore Fabrication & Shipbuilding
mekaheavy.description: A strategic arm dedicated to high-capacity fabrication, shipbuilding, and structural solutions for the offshore and energy sectors. Delivering heavy-lift platforms and marine structures built to the most demanding specifications.

indiaports.subtitle: Port Development & Operations
indiaports.description: The port development division managing the landmark Rewas Port — a 50-year concession from the Government of Maharashtra. India Ports is creating one of India's deepest and most modern port facilities through a partnership with Reliance.

virajce.subtitle: Marine & Geotechnical Consulting
virajce.description: End-to-end project management, hydrographic surveys, and technical consultancy for coastal and marine infrastructure. Viraj provides the engineering intelligence that underpins complex offshore and harbor projects.

mekaconsultants.subtitle: Strategic & Management Advisory
mekaconsultants.description: A multidisciplinary consultancy offering strategic management, human capital services, and technical advisory. From IT solutions and manpower to financial consulting, Meka Consultants supports the group's diverse operations.

meka-realty.subtitle: Premium Urban Development
meka-realty.description: Entering the real estate space with a vision to create sustainable, functional urban environments. Meka Realty brings the same engineering rigor from our marine heritage into premium residential and commercial developments in Mumbai.

meka-education.subtitle: Knowledge & Skill Development
meka-education.description: Foraying into the education sector with a commitment to building the next generation of engineering talent. Meka Education focuses on maritime studies, vocational training, and technical skill development programs.

business.heroDesc: From marine construction and dredging to port development and urban infrastructure — five specialized verticals delivering end-to-end engineering solutions across India and the Middle East.
business.ctaDesc: Whether it's a new marine EPC project, port development, or urban infrastructure — we'd love to hear from you.

marine.title:
Marine
Construction
marine.description: Based on principles of innovation and engineering, our marine construction projects form the foundation of the Meka Group. From coastal protection and breakwaters to port facilities and offshore structures, we build infrastructure that withstands the harshest marine environments.

dredging.title:
Dredging &
Reclamation
dredging.description: One of India's top capital dredging and reclamation companies, operating an advanced fleet of cutter suction and trailing suction hopper dredgers. We maintain vital waterways, create land from the sea, and execute deep-water channel projects with centimeter-level precision.

infrastructure.title:
Urban
Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Taking up EPC work for the urban infrastructure segment — from intake and outfall pipelines to sheet piling, treatment plants, and ground improvement. We deliver the critical systems that cities depend on for water, sanitation, and resilience.

port.title:
Port
Development
port.description: Design and development of ports on Build-Own-Operate-Share-Transfer basis. Our landmark Rewas Port project — a 50-year concession from the Government of Maharashtra — exemplifies our vision for creating India's deepest and most modern port facilities.

estate.title:
Real
Estate
estate.description: Developing quality residential and commercial spaces in India's largest real estate market. Meka Realty brings the same engineering rigor and commitment to excellence from our marine heritage into creating sustainable urban environments.

careers.heroDesc: Four decades of engineering excellence. Join a team that reshapes coastlines, builds tomorrow's infrastructure, and engineers resilience into every project.
careers.legacyDesc: 45+ years of pioneering marine construction and coastal infrastructure across India and beyond.
careers.diverseDesc: Nine specialized companies spanning marine, dredging, ports, infrastructure, real estate, and consulting.
careers.growthDesc: Work on landmark projects that shape India's coastline and infrastructure for generations to come.
